description: Metadata for a parallel world version — canon, speculative, retcon, fork, or collaboration.

type.description: CANON: Primary version, the accepted truth. SPECULATIVE: "What if" exploration. RETCON: Retroactive change to established canon. FORK: Independent version by another author. COLLAB: Collaborator working on a section.

parent_variant.description: Identifier of the variant this one diverged from

description.description: Human-readable description of this variant's purpose

affects_frames.description: Frame IDs affected by this variant

examples.description: The primary accepted version of events
What if the hero had refused the call?
